## Verification

- [ ] Ran relevant tests or checks
- [ ] Verified schema/API changes manually if tests do not cover them
- [ ] Confirmed ledger exports do not include image bytes or base64 media
- [ ] For frontend changes: ran build, browser smoke test, and console check

## Risk Review

- [ ] Accounting behavior is unchanged or follows the linked spec
- [ ] Import/export behavior is unchanged or follows the linked spec
- [ ] Privacy/media behavior is unchanged or follows the linked spec
- [ ] Sync/offline behavior is unchanged or follows the linked spec

## Data/Privacy Impact

- [ ] No real credentials, personal ledger data, receipts, or meal photos are committed
- [ ] RLS/security behavior is unchanged or explained below
